subject: New Assignment: Backend Engineer
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Bankry (fintech) is looking for a senior Backend Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2025-03-13
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: competitive (details on request)

Required tech:
• Go
• GCP
• Docker
• PostgreSQL
• SQS
• Hugging Face

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Therese Magnusson
Staffing Coordinator
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 76 344 56 78
